options.command: sh -c 'rm -rf /tmp/fibe-agent-e2e-yaml /tmp/fibe-agent-e2e-playground; mkdir -p /tmp/fibe-agent-e2e-yaml /tmp/fibe-agent-e2e-playground; cp fixtures/fibe-settings.e2e.yml /tmp/fibe-agent-e2e-yaml/fibe.yml; api_entry="$(pwd)/../api/dist/main.js"; export PORT="${PORT:-3334}" PLAYGROUNDS_DIR=/tmp/fibe-agent-e2e-playground MOCK_ECHO_PROMPT=true NODE_ENV=production; (cd /tmp/fibe-agent-e2e-yaml && node "$api_entry") & sleep 3 && bun test --preload ./src/support/test-setup.ts'
